title: Arabian Oryx: If you wish, you can become strong
overview: With the magic of the Earth fairy LaTerre, Kanade is transformed into an Arabian oryx. Together with his friends, they continue to trek across the vast desert in search of water. Will they be able to find it?

title: Quetzal: The beauty of "Thank you"
overview: Kanade is transformed into a quetzal by LaTerre's magic. She eats nuts, returns seeds to the forest, and takes a walk in the air with her lovely tail feather friends! She learns about the cycle of life and the beauty of saying "thank you.'

title: Napoleon Fish: The Importance of Freedom
overview: Kanade is transformed into a Napoleon Fish by LaTerre's magic. Swimming through the ocean with her gluttonous and laid-back companions, she learns the importance of living freely through an adventure filled with confusion and laughter.
